# BP-136 negative variant: a request handler delegates migration to startup-owned code.
lang: go
file: BP-136-variant-safe.go
variant: gorm-handler-delegation
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func migrateSchema(db *gorm.DB) error {
	return db.AutoMigrate(&User{})
}

func createUser(c *gin.Context) {
	_ = c
}
